example_tasks: Solve the integration bug in the API
Connect the CRM to the marketing platform
Figure out the missing piece of the project plan
Debug the complex logic in the backend
Develop a strategy for the new product launch
Fit the new team members into the current workflow
Complete the final section of the report
Map out the user journey flow
Resolve the conflict in the git repository
Synthesize research findings into a summary
reasoning: The puzzle piece is a strong, universally recognized metaphor for problem-solving, integration, and fitting complex parts together, making it highly effective for technical or strategic tasks.
